title: We're Going Crazy World
lyrics:
Ooh, I got a feeling I'm going a little crazy
Its a little hazy
I think, we're all going crazy
In the night I feel
The same familiar itch
Are you for real?
or a part of my imagination
A real crazy little mess of me
I don't wanna be better than anyone
But I think I feel a little more
Wanna put it to the test
compete for me
And when you're crazy
you compete for you
Yeah, a little bit of what we should do
Hey, the world's going crazy
I think we're all getting hazy
Can't see the true lines
To justify anything anymore
No, what we go to war
Why we hurt each other
Why we want anything bad to you
until you take whats mine
You're gonna find out
What we're really made of, yeah
The world's going crazy
Oh, it's all going crazy
The world's going hazy
I can't see past the lies
In disguise of our own mind
Yeah, the world's going crazy
Oh, the world's going
To knock you out
Oh, you see the truth
light in me
Oh, oh, oh, oh
Why you listen to your own voice
Protect yours for yours
There's no reason why
Cause the world's going crazy
The world's going hazy
I can't seemingly to define anything anymore
In my mind
We're all going crazy
Why, why are we
Why are we so crazy
So crazy
From the bottom of my heart
To the bottom of my soul
I want you to know that
It's the life we adore
Even when we're shuffled around
I'm going out alone
Take a thought
Take imagination with you
Don't blame us for your point of view
Until you see it
Then you realize
What did you have to do then
Oh, you're just a piece of us
All going crazy
Crazy, crazy
All going crazy, crazy
Find yourself between the lines
be okay be okay
It's alright
Crazy, crazy, crazy, crazy in me
It's crazy in you
Woo-hoo, woo-hoo
